# Momentum Investment

Project context for AI coding agents lives in **[AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md)** —
the canonical source of truth, named to match the cross-tool convention
(Cursor, Codex CLI, etc. all read this filename). This file exists only
so Claude Code picks up the same context without an extra config flag;
**do not edit CLAUDE.md directly.** Update `AGENTS.md` and let this
pointer ride along.
